
## PDAC-adrenal-invasion

```{{comment}}
---
description: |
    Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu, Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion, patoloji, atlas, pathology, whole slide image, virtual microscopy, virtual microscope, sanal mikroskop
date: last-modified
categories: [Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu, Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion]
page-layout: full
bibliography: references.bib
---
```

```{{r language PDAC-adrenal-invasion, echo=FALSE, include=TRUE}}
source("./R/language.R")
output_type <- knitr::opts_knit$get("rmarkdown.pandoc.to")
```

```{{asis Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu TR , echo = (language == "TR")}}
## Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu {{#sec-PDAC-adrenal-invasion }}
```

```{{asis Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion EN , echo = (language == "EN")}}
## Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion {{#sec-PDAC-adrenal-invasion }}
```


```{{r PDAC-adrenal-invasion screenshot HE, eval=TRUE, include=FALSE}}
if (!file.exists("./screenshots/thumbnail_PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE.png")) {{
webshot2::webshot(
  url = "https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html",
  file = "./screenshots/thumbnail_PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE.png"
)
}}
```

```{{r PDAC-adrenal-invasion qrcode HE, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE, error=TRUE}}
if (!file.exists("./qrcodes/PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE_qrcode.svg")) {{
  qrcode_svg <- qrcode::qr_code("https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html")
  qrcode::generate_svg(qrcode = qrcode_svg,
                       filename = "./qrcodes/PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE_qrcode.svg",
                       show = FALSE)
}}
```

::::: panel-tabset

### WSI - Link


:::: {{.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}}

```{{asis, echo = (language == "TR")}}
**Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu**

[![Tam Ekran Görmek İçin Resmi Tıklayın](./screenshots/thumbnail_PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE.png){{width="25%"}}](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html) [Tam Ekran Görmek İçin Resmi Tıklayın](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html)
```

::::

:::: {{.content-visible when-format="pdf"}}

```{{asis, echo = (language == "TR")}}
**Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu**

![](./qrcodes/PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE_qrcode.svg){{width="15%"}} [![Tam Ekran Görmek İçin Resmi Tıklayın](./screenshots/thumbnail_PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE.png){{width="25%"}}](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html) [Tam Ekran Görmek İçin Resmi Tıklayın](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html)
```

::::

:::: {{.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}}

```{{asis, echo = (language == "EN")}}
**Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion**

[![Click for Full Screen WSI](./screenshots/thumbnail_PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE.png){{width="25%"}}](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html) [Click for Full Screen WSI](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html)
```

::::

:::: {{.content-visible when-format="pdf"}}

```{{asis, echo = (language == "EN")}}
**Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion**

![](./qrcodes/PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE_qrcode.svg){{width="15%"}} [![Click for Full Screen WSI](./screenshots/thumbnail_PDAC-adrenal-invasion-HE.png){{width="25%"}}](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html) [Click for Full Screen WSI](https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html)
```

::::

### WSI


```{{asis, echo = ((language=="TR") & (output_type=="html"))}}
Mikroskopik görüntüleri inceleyin:

<iframe src="https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html" style="height:600px;width:100%;" data-external="1"></iframe>
```

```{{asis, echo = ((language == "EN") & (output_type=="html"))}}
See Microscopy with viewer:

<iframe src="https://images.patolojiatlasi.com/PDAC-adrenal-invasion/HE.html" style="height:600px;width:100%;" data-external="1"></iframe>
```

### Diagnosis

```{{asis, echo = (language == "TR")}}
::: {{.callout-tip collapse="true" appearance="default" icon="true"}}
### Tanı için tıklayın

Pankreatik Duktal Adenokarsinom Adrenal Bez İnvazyonu
:::
```

```{{asis, echo = (language == "EN")}}
::: {{.callout-tip collapse="true" appearance="default" icon="true"}}
### Click for Diagnosis

Pancreatic Ductal Adenocarcinoma, Adrenal Gland Invasion
:::
```

:::::
